# Sovereignbase

> Specifications, documentation, demos, API references, and implementation notes for Sovereignbase and related Actor/Base Station components.

Sovereignbase lets developers build normal web applications without becoming responsible for owning, operating, or controlling their users’ data backend.

Sovereignbase treats every user-agent as an Actor: a cryptographic participant that owns and validates its own state. Servers are Base Stations: service infrastructure for storage, relay, backup, synchronization, discovery, and cross-origin coordination.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://sovereignbase.dev/): Main entry point for Sovereignbase.
- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/sovereignbase): Sovereignbase repositories, package source code, project README, and implementation work.

## Core model

- [Sovereignbase GitHub README](https://github.com/sovereignbase): Current high-level project description.
- [ANBS Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/anbs): The Actor and the Base Station architecture.
- [Convergent Replicated Resource Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-resource): Resource layer for portable replicated resources.

## Data and replication

- [Convergent Replicated Map Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-map/): Specification for Convergent Replicated Map, a delta CRDT for dynamic non-empty string-keyed maps.
- [Convergent Replicated Map Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-map): Source repository for Convergent Replicated Map.

- [Convergent Replicated Set Demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/): Browser demo for Convergent Replicated Set.
- [Convergent Replicated Set Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the Convergent Replicated Set package.
- [Convergent Replicated Set Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-set/spec/): ReSpec specification for Convergent Replicated Set.
- [Convergent Replicated Set Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-set): Source repository for Convergent Replicated Set.

- [Convergent Replicated List Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-list/): Specification for Convergent Replicated List, a delta CRDT for ordered sequence state.
- [Convergent Replicated List Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-list/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the Convergent Replicated List package.
- [Convergent Replicated List Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-list): Source repository for Convergent Replicated List.

- [Convergent Replicated Text Demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/): Browser demo for Convergent Replicated Text.
- [Convergent Replicated Text Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the Convergent Replicated Text package.
- [Convergent Replicated Text Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-text/spec/): ReSpec specification for Convergent Replicated Text.
- [Convergent Replicated Text Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-text): Source repository for Convergent Replicated Text.

- [Convergent Replicated Struct Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-struct/): Specification for Convergent Replicated Struct, a delta CRDT for fixed-key object structs.
- [Convergent Replicated Struct Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/convergent-replicated-struct/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the Convergent Replicated Struct package.
- [Convergent Replicated Struct Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/convergent-replicated-struct): Source repository for Convergent Replicated Struct.

- [Schema CRDT Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/schema-crdt/): TypeDoc documentation for Schema.org schemas modeled as CRDTs.
- [Schema CRDT Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/schema-crdt): Source repository for Schema.org schemas modeled as CRDTs.

## Cryptography and identifiers

- [Cryptosuite Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/cryptosuite): JS/TS runtime-agnostic cryptography toolkit for cipher messaging, authentication, signatures, key agreement, and identifiers.
- [Hardware Bound Package](https://sovereignbase.dev/hardware-bound/): Device-bound entropy tools for zero-knowledge and local-first cryptographic bootstrapping.
- [Hardware Bound Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/hardware-bound): Source repository for hardware-bound entropy bootstrapping.
- [Bytecodec Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/bytecodec): Runtime-agnostic byte toolkit for UTF-8, base64, base64url, hex, Z85, BigInt conversion, JSON, compression, concatenation, and comparison.
- [URN ANBS Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/urn-anbs/): Specification for ANBS Uniform Resource Names.
- [URN ANBS Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/urn-anbs/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the urn-anbs package.
- [URN ANBS Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/urn-anbs): Source repository for ANBS Uniform Resource Names.
- [Verifiable Continuity Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/verifiable-continuity): Source repository for the verifiable continuity attestation scheme.
- [DID ANBS Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/did-anbs): Source repository for the ANBS DID method work.

## Browser and coordination primitives

- [QR](https://sovereignbase.dev/qr/): Tools for encoding information, such as recovery keys, into QR codes, and for scanning or printing QR codes.
- [QR Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/qr): Source repository for QR display, print, and scan utilities.

- [Peer-to-peer Demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/): Browser demo for the peer-to-peer module.
- [Peer-to-peer Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the peer-to-peer package.
- [Peer-to-peer Specification](https://sovereignbase.dev/peer2peer/spec): ReSpec specification for the peer-to-peer module.
- [Peer-to-peer Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/peer2peer): Source repository for browser peer-to-peer connection setup.

- [Offline KV Store Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/offline-kv-store): Namespace-scoped key-value storage on top of IndexedDB.
- [Station Client Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/station-client): Local-first station client for tabs and workers sharing a Sovereignbase Base Station transport.
- [Base Station Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/base-station): Source repository for Base Station implementation work.
- [Sharding Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/sharding): Deterministic shard-index derivation for string and byte inputs.
- [Cipher Store Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/cipher-store): Source repository for cipher storage work.
- [Actor Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/actor): Source repository for Actor implementation work.

## Dragonwatch

- [Dragonwatch Demo](https://sovereignbase.dev/dragonwatch/): Browser demo showing the Dragonwatch module in action.
- [Dragonwatch Documentation](https://sovereignbase.dev/dragonwatch/docs/): TypeDoc documentation for the Dragonwatch package.
- [Dragonwatch Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/dragonwatch): Source repository for pointer-driven dragging and element watching primitives.

## Reports and design notes

- [LQSCD Report](https://sovereignbase.dev/lqscd-report/): Report page listed in the Sovereignbase sitemap.
- [RQSCD Report](https://sovereignbase.dev/rqscd-report/): Report page listed in the Sovereignbase sitemap.
- [Misc Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/misc): Miscellaneous documents, diagrams, and supporting notes.

## Website source

- [Sovereignbase Website Repository](https://github.com/sovereignbase/sovereignbase.github.io): Source repository for sovereignbase.dev.
- [Sitemap](https://github.com/sovereignbase/sovereignbase.github.io/blob/main/docs/sitemap.xml): Current sitemap source.
- [llms.txt Source](https://github.com/sovereignbase/sovereignbase.github.io/blob/main/docs/llms.txt): Current llms.txt source.

## Notes for language models

Use specification pages as the primary source for protocol and data-structure behavior.

Use TypeDoc pages for package APIs, exported types, classes, methods, and implementation details.

Use browser demos as examples of runtime behavior, not as normative specifications.

When describing Sovereignbase, distinguish between Sovereignbase as the project/product and the Actor and the Base Station architecture as the underlying architectural model.
